description: Strategy principles frozen before the hybrid policy migration. Expected behavior is justified by legal mechanics, not copied from current output.

fixtures.principle: A complete reachable Charged sequence must outrank a locally attractive losing sequence.
fixtures.initialState: Shadow Quagsire (Mud Shot, Aqua Tail, Mud Bomb) versus Galarian Corsola (Astonish, Night Shade, Power Gem), 2-2 shields, default profiles, zero energy.
fixtures.legalLine: Aqua Tail T8/T17/T30/T37/T44; Night Shade T21/T34 is a legal project-mechanics reference line.
fixtures.expectedBehavior: Choose a coherent outcome-best route under rational responses.
acceptableAlternatives: Any independently verified winning best-response line.
forbiddenBehavior: Treat stranded terminal energy as more valuable than the deciding Charged Move.
timelineInvariants: Fast timing and CMP use Unified Turn Resolution.

fixtures.initialState: Actor has an affordable unshielded lethal Charged Move and no pending Fast lethal.
fixtures.legalLine: Throw the cheapest equivalent lethal now.

fixtures.initialState: Actor has a meaningful Charged Move but cannot survive the next opposing Fast action window.
fixtures.legalLine: Throw before the lethal Fast impact/window.
acceptableAlternatives: Any higher outcome-class affordable Charged Move.
forbiddenBehavior: Fast Move that loses all Charged access.

fixtures.initialState: One Fast improves timing or reaches another Charged count without faint, overflow, lost lethal, or opponent Charged access.
fixtures.legalLine: Fast once, then re-plan.
timelineInvariants: Exactly one Fast is recommended by the timing result.

fixtures.initialState: One Fast concedes lethal damage or loses the current winning Charged window.
fixtures.legalLine: Throw now.

fixtures.initialState: Fast damage KOs before opponent reaches meaningful pressure; Charged energy would be terminally unused.
fixtures.legalLine: Continue Fast Moves to KO.
acceptableAlternatives: Outcome-identical lethal Charged only when farm is unsafe.
timelineInvariants: Farm route records required Fast count and incoming damage.

fixtures.initialState: Both moves are meaningful and their complete reachable sequences differ.
fixtures.legalLine: Select the route with the better outcome class, then resources.

fixtures.initialState: Cheap and expensive moves are available with shields in play.
fixtures.legalLine: SELECTIVE compares credible bait and straight routes; OFF does not assume bait success.
acceptableAlternatives: Straight line when the defender would not shield.
timelineInvariants: Bait mode is present in the state hash.

fixtures.initialState: A nonlethal self-Attack-debuffing nuke can be stacked before use.
fixtures.legalLine: Stack safely or choose a safer winning route; throw immediately only when forced.

fixtures.initialState: A guaranteed self-buff changes later canonical damage or survival.
fixtures.legalLine: Preserve the buff route for comparison.

fixtures.initialState: Shield and no-shield can change the terminal outcome.
fixtures.legalLine: Compare both plausible responses and choose Win > Draw > Loss.
acceptableAlternatives: Dominant fast shield decision when one response is objectively resolved.
forbiddenBehavior: Let heuristic damage ratio override a proven outcome.

fixtures.initialState: Both actors reach Charged readiness on the same canonical turn in two Attack-order variants.
fixtures.legalLine: Higher Attack acts first; lower Attack cannot use a post-faint Charged Move.

fixtures.initialState: Actor and opponent Fast Moves have different durations and an opponent Fast is active.
fixtures.legalLine: Throw or wait using ready turns and the pending impact boundary.

fixtures.initialState: Another Fast would overflow 100 energy and a meaningful Charged Move is ready.
fixtures.legalLine: Throw unless waiting proves a superior outcome.
acceptableAlternatives: Non-overflowing technical wait with proven superior outcome.
forbiddenBehavior: Overflow energy on an ordinary Fast.

fixtures.initialState: A committed Fast impact is pending against either combatant.
fixtures.legalLine: Do not waste a Charged Move when own pending Fast is lethal; throw before an opposing pending lethal when legally earlier.

fixtures.initialState: Scenario Review supplies a deferred Fast impact and one-turn action window.
fixtures.legalLine: Use the supplied canonical pending event; do not invent separate strategy mechanics.
forbiddenBehavior: Duplicate lag damage rules in the planner.

fixtures.initialState: Two otherwise identical states differ in derived Attack/Defense/HP and cross a damage or CMP breakpoint.
fixtures.legalLine: Keep distinct hashes and permit different winners.
forbiddenBehavior: Merge states by species identity only.
timelineInvariants: Derived stats and IV metadata remain in signatures.

fixtures.initialState: One legal route wins with one HP while another loses with residual energy.
fixtures.legalLine: Select the winning route.
forbiddenBehavior: Residual energy ranks a loss above the one-HP win.
timelineInvariants: HP is never rounded to zero early.

fixtures.initialState: One line produces simultaneous faint; another produces actor-only faint.
fixtures.legalLine: Choose the draw.
forbiddenBehavior: Heuristic score ranks loss above draw.

fixtures.initialState: Compared lines end with equal raw energy, but only one reaches a meaningful Charged action before faint.
fixtures.legalLine: Reward only the reachable conversion.
forbiddenBehavior: Reward stranded energy as surviving pressure.
